hero.h1: Software built for environments that cannot fail.
hero.sub: We work with organizations where downtime is a liability, not a metric.
hero.body: Custom development, automation, AI integration, and security hardening. Delivered with the rigor that regulated and mission-critical operations demand.

systemsArch.title: Systems Architecture
systemsArch.description: Infrastructure design, integration planning, and technical roadmap development.

automation.title: Automation Engineering
automation.description: Process digitization, workflow orchestration, and operational tooling.

aiWorkflow.title: AI Workflow Integration
aiWorkflow.description: Model integration, pipeline automation, and operational ML within existing systems.

securityHardening.title: Security Hardening
securityHardening.description: Threat modeling, access control (RBAC), audit logging, and compliance readiness.

constraints.title: Operate on constraints
constraints.description: We design under real operational limits: offline-first, audit trails, and strict change control.

failure.title: Engineer for failure
failure.description: We assume failures happen and build systems that degrade safely, log everything, and recover cleanly.

discipline.title: Ship with discipline
discipline.description: Clear scopes. Deterministic delivery. Documentation that survives audits and personnel turnover.

security.label: Security
security.title: Security hardening is part of the architecture — not an add-on.
security.item2: Access control design (RBAC), audit logging, and change control
security.item3: Encryption at rest, secrets handling, and local-only data strategies

about.label: About
about.headline: A focused practice. Not an agency.
about.body: NOKU LABS works directly with technical leads and decision-makers in regulated and operationally sensitive environments. No large rosters. No handoffs. Precise, accountable delivery.

directEngagement.title: Direct engagement
directEngagement.description: No account managers or intermediaries. Engineering decisions are made by the engineers doing the work.

smallByDesign.title: Small by design
smallByDesign.description: Intentionally limited client load ensures every project receives full technical attention.

builtToLast.title: Built to last
builtToLast.description: Systems we stand behind. Documentation, handover, and post-delivery support are part of the scope.

trust.label: Trust Signals
trust.headline: Built for environments where errors have consequences.

audit.title: Audit-ready by design
audit.description: Immutable logs, RBAC, and deterministic outputs embedded directly into the workflow.

operationalDiscipline.title: Operational discipline
operationalDiscipline.description: Clear scope, clear ownership, and documentation that holds under scrutiny.

local.title: Local-first capability
local.description: Systems that continue operating when networks fail or constraints tighten.

systems.label: Reference Work
systems.title: Issuance + archival platform for regulated workflows.
systems.body: Systems built for strict operational requirements: local-first data, deterministic template rendering, PDF export, archiving, and audit-grade logging.

footer.tagline: Architecture-first systems. Built to hold under scrutiny.
